metadata.entity_type: GmbH (Private Limited Company) — Mittelgroße Kapitalgesellschaft (§ 267 Abs. 2 HGB)

checklist.disclosure_item: Is immaterielles Anlagevermögen (intangible assets) properly presented, including self-created vs. acquired separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify line items 1-4 are separately disclosed: self-created IP, acquired IP/licenses, goodwill (Geschäftswert), and prepayments on intangible assets.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is selbst geschaffene gewerbliche Schutzrechte (self-created industrial property rights) disclosed separately from entgeltlich erworbene (acquired) items?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm distinction between self-created (1) and purchased (2) intangible assets is maintained.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Geschäfts- oder Firmenwert (goodwill) from business combinations separately recognised and amortised over useful life?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify goodwill is recognised, tested for impairment annually, and amortised over max 10 years per §285 No. 13.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are geleistete Anzahlungen on intangible assets disclosed as prepayments on non-current assets?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Check prepayments are disclosed separately under item 4.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Sachanlagen (tangible fixed assets) properly classified into Grundstücke/Bauten, Technische Anlagen/Maschinen, and Betriebs- und Geschäftsausstattung?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all four categories (1-4) are separately disclosed: land/buildings, technical equipment, other equipment, and prepayments/WIP.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Grundstücke und grundstücksgleiche Rechte (land and land rights) including buildings on third-party land disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm land and buildings (including those on leased land) are disclosed as one line item per §266.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is technical equipment and machinery (technische Anlagen und Maschinen) disclosed as a separate line item?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify technical plant and machinery are disclosed separately from other tangible assets.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are other plant, equipment, and office fixtures (andere Anlagen, Betriebs- und Geschäftsausstattung) disclosed as a separate line item?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm furniture, fixtures, vehicles, and other equipment are aggregated under this line.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are prepayments and construction in progress (geleistete Anzahlungen und Anlagen im Bau) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify prepayments and assets under construction are disclosed as a single line item.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Finanzanlagen (financial assets) properly classified into the six specified categories?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all six sub-categories are disclosed: shares in affiliated companies, loans to affiliates, participations, loans to related parties, securities, and other loans.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Anteile an verbundenen Unternehmen (shares in affiliated companies) disclosed separately from Beteiligungen (participations)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm clear distinction between affiliated companies (control/influence) and simple participations.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Ausleihungen (loans) to affiliated companies and to companies with participation interests disclosed separately from equity items?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify loans to affiliates and loans to related party companies are shown separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Wertpapiere des Anlagevermögens (securities held as non-current assets) disclosed separately from current portfolio?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm securities intended to be held long-term are classified here rather than in Umlaufvermögen.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are sonstige Ausleihungen (other loans) disclosed as a final line item under financial assets?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify other loans not covered by items 2 or 4 are disclosed here.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Vorräte (inventories) properly broken down into raw materials, work-in-progress, finished goods, and prepayments?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all four inventory categories are disclosed: Roh-, Hilfs- und Betriebsstoffe; unfertige Erzeugnisse/Leistungen; fertige Erzeugnisse und Waren; geleistete Anzahlungen.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Roh-, Hilfs- und Betriebsstoffe (raw materials, consumables, and supplies) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm raw materials, consumables, and supplies are disclosed as item 1.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are unfertige Erzeugnisse and unfertige Leistungen (work in progress and services not yet billed) disclosed together?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify semi-finished goods and unbilled services are aggregated under item 2.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are finished goods and merchandise (fertige Erzeugnisse und Waren) disclosed as a single line item?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm finished products and goods held for resale are aggregated.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are prepayments on inventory (geleistete Anzahlungen) disclosed as the final inventory line?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify inventory prepayments are disclosed as item 4.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Forderungen und sonstige Vermögensgegenstände (receivables and other assets) broken down by counterparty type?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify receivables are split into: trade receivables, receivables from affiliates, receivables from related parties, and other assets.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Forderungen aus Lieferungen und Leistungen (trade receivables) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm trade receivables from ordinary business operations are shown separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are receivables from affiliated companies (Forderungen gegen verbundene Unternehmen) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify receivables from affiliated entities are disclosed separately from trade receivables.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are receivables from companies with participation interests (Forderungen gegen Unternehmen mit Beteiligungsverhältnis) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm receivables from related party companies (not fully affiliated) are shown separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are sonstige Vermögensgegenstände (other assets) disclosed as a catch-all for non-trade receivables?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify other receivables including tax assets and miscellaneous items are disclosed here.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Wertpapiere (securities) classified in current assets split into shares in affiliates and other securities?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify securities are split: shares in affiliated companies (1) vs. other securities (2).

checklist.disclosure_item: Is liquid cash position (Kassenbestand, Bundesbankguthaben, Guthaben bei Kreditinstituten und Schecks) disclosed as a single line?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm cash at bank, central bank balances, cash on hand, and cheques are aggregated.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten (prepaid expenses) on the asset side disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify prepaid expenses benefiting future periods are disclosed as item C.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are aktive latente Steuern (deferred tax assets) disclosed as a separate posten under asset side?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm deferred tax assets are recognised per §274 HGB and disclosed separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is aktiver Unterschiedsbetrag aus der Vermögensverrechnung (asset difference from asset offsetting) disclosed separately?
checklist.trigger_condition: If assets are offset against liabilities per §246 Abs. 2 HGB resulting in a net asset position
checklist.completeness_prompt: Only applicable if asset offsetting under §246 Abs. 2 creates a net asset; verify calculation.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Eigenkapital (equity) properly structured with the five main components: subscribed capital, capital reserves, retained earnings, profit/loss brought forward, and annual result?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all equity components are disclosed in the order prescribed: I to V.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Gezeichnetes Kapital (subscribed capital) disclosed at the nominal amount per Articles of Association?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm the stated share capital matches the commercial register entry (Stammkapital).

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Kapitalrücklage (capital reserve) disclosed separately and showing share premium from capital contributions?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify capital reserves include share premium, contributions in kind, and other equity contributions.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Gewinnrücklagen (retained earnings) disclosed with all four sub-categories: legal reserve, reserve for own shares, statutory reserves, and other retained earnings?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all four reserves are disclosed separately: legal (gesetzliche), reserves for shares in controlling company, statutory (satzungsmäßige), and other reserves.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the gesetzliche Rücklage (legal reserve) disclosed separately and is the required 10% of subscribed capital maintained?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm the legal reserve per §150 HGB is maintained (5% of annual surplus until 10% of share capital reached).

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Rücklage für Anteile an einem herrschenden oder mehrheitlich beteiligten Unternehmen (reserve for shares in controlling company) disclosed if applicable?
checklist.trigger_condition: If the company holds shares in a controlling or majority-owned entity
checklist.completeness_prompt: Only applicable if such shares are held; verify reserve is created per §150 Abs. 2 HGB.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are satzungsmäßige Rücklagen (statutory reserves per articles of association) disclosed separately?
checklist.trigger_condition: If the Articles of Association require additional reserves to be set aside
checklist.completeness_prompt: Only required if mandatory under the GmbH's articles (Gesellschaftsvertrag).

checklist.disclosure_item: Are andere Gewinnrücklagen (other retained earnings) disclosed as a catch-all for voluntary reserves?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify other retained earnings from profit distributions are disclosed here.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Gewinnvortrag/Verlustvortrag (profit/loss brought forward) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm prior year retained profit or loss is shown separately before the current year result.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is Jahresüberschuss/Jahresfehlbetrag (annual profit or loss for the year) disclosed as the final equity line?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify current year result is disclosed as the bottom line of equity before provisions.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Rückstellungen (provisions) disclosed as three separate categories: pension provisions, tax provisions, and other provisions?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify the three-line presentation: pension/tax/other provisions.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Rückstellungen für Pensionen und ähnliche Verpflichtungen (pension provisions and similar obligations) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm pension provisions and similar long-term employee benefits are disclosed as item 1.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the underlying actuarial calculation for pension provisions performed in accordance with §253 Abs. 2 HGB and disclosed in the Anhang?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify discount rate and actuarial assumptions per §253 Abs. 2 are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Steuerrückstellungen (tax provisions) disclosed as a separate line item?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify tax provisions for income and other taxes are disclosed separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are sonstige Rückstellungen (other provisions) disclosed as the final provisions line, including all non-pension/tax provisions?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify other provisions for uncertain liabilities, anticipated losses, and other obligations are aggregated.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are other provisions measured at the settlement amount that reflects the best estimate, with discounting for long-term provisions per §253 Abs. 2?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm provisions are measured appropriately and long-term provisions are discounted.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Verbindlichkeiten (liabilities) disclosed with all eight categories in prescribed order, including sub-detail for convertible bonds and tax/social security?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all eight liability categories are disclosed with specified breakdowns.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Anleihen (bonds) disclosed, with a sub-row showing the convertible portion if applicable?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm bonds are disclosed; if convertible, show 'davon konvertibel' amount.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Verbindlichkeiten gegenüber Kreditinstituten (bank loans and borrowings) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify all bank loans and overdrafts are disclosed as item 2.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are erhaltene Anzahlungen auf Bestellungen (advance payments received on orders) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify customer advances are disclosed separately from trade payables.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Verbindlichkeiten aus Lieferungen und Leistungen (trade payables) disclosed separately?
checklist.evidence_location: Bilanz, Verbindlichkeiten aus Lieferungen und Leistungen
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm trade payables from ordinary business operations are disclosed as item 4.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are liabilities from accepted drafts (Wechselverbindlichkeiten) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify liabilities from drawn and own acceptances are disclosed as item 5.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Verbindlichkeiten gegenüber verbundenen Unternehmen (payables to affiliated companies) disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm payables to affiliated entities are disclosed separately from trade payables.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are Verbindlichkeiten gegenüber Unternehmen mit Beteiligungsverhältnis (payables to related party companies) disclosed separately?
checklist.evidence_location: Bilanz, Verbindlichkeiten gegenüber Unternehmen mit Beteiligungsverhältnis
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify payables to companies with participation interests are disclosed separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are sonstige Verbindlichkeiten (other liabilities) disclosed as item 8 with sub-totals for tax liabilities and social security?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify 'davon aus Steuern' and 'davon im Rahmen der sozialen Sicherheit' are disclosed as sub-rows.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the Rechnungsabgrenzungsposten (deferred income) on the liability side disclosed separately?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify deferred income (receipts relating to future periods) is disclosed as item D.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are passive latente Steuern (deferred tax liabilities) disclosed as the final liability item?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Confirm deferred tax liabilities are recognised per §274 HGB and disclosed separately.

checklist.disclosure_item: For liabilities with maturity exceeding one year, is the breakdown by remaining maturity disclosed in the Anhang per §285 No. 1 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify maturity analysis is provided for liabilities with >1 year remaining.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is collateral provided for liabilities disclosed in the Anhang per §285 No. 2 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify nature and form of collateral pledged for liabilities is disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the nominal capital and changes in capital reserves disclosed per §285 No. 3 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify share capital and capital reserve changes are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: For medium GmbH, is the disclosure of the entity's profit appropriation proposal required or is the proposal disclosed in the Anhang?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify profit distribution proposal or decision is disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the total amount of liabilities secured by collateral (Pfandbriefe, etc.) disclosed per §285 No. 3a?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify aggregate amount of liabilities with collateral is disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: For medium GmbH, is the exemption from detailed disclosure of provisions in the Anhang applied per §288 Abs. 2?
checklist.trigger_condition: Medium GmbH not providing detailed provision breakdown in Anhang
checklist.completeness_prompt: If §288 Abs. 2 exemption claimed, verify no detailed provision list in Anhang (full detail still recommended for transparency).

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung) prepared using the total cost method (Gesamtkostenverfahren) as required by §275 Abs. 1 HGB?
checklist.evidence_location: Notes (Anhang) or management report (Lagebericht) if applicable
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify the GuV is structured using the total cost method (Gesamtkostenverfahren) per §275 Abs. 1

checklist.disclosure_item: Revenue (Umsatzerlöse) - Line item 1 of Gesamtkostenverfahren
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Umsatzerlöse (revenue) is disclosed as line item 1 in the GuV

checklist.disclosure_item: Increase or decrease in inventory of finished goods and work in progress (Bestand an fertigen und unfertigen Erzeugnissen) - Line item 2
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Bestand an fertigen und unfertigen Erzeugnissen is disclosed as line item 2

checklist.disclosure_item: Other own work capitalized (Andere aktivierte Eigenleistungen) - Line item 3
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Andere aktivierte Eigenleistungen is disclosed as line item 3

checklist.disclosure_item: Total operating performance (Gesamtleistung) - Calculated from lines 1-3
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Gesamtleistung is calculated correctly (Umsatzerlöse + Bestandsveränderung + aktivierte Eigenleistungen)

checklist.disclosure_item: Cost of materials (Materialaufwand) - Line item 4
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Materialaufwand is disclosed as line item 4

checklist.disclosure_item: Personnel costs (Personalaufwand) - Line item 5
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Personalaufwand is disclosed as line item 5

checklist.disclosure_item: Depreciation and amortization (Abschreibungen) - Line item 6
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Abschreibungen (on intangible assets and property, plant and equipment) is disclosed as line item 6

checklist.disclosure_item: Other operating expenses (Sonstige betriebliche Aufwendungen) - Line item 7
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Sonstige betriebliche Aufwendungen is disclosed as line item 7

checklist.disclosure_item: Operating result (Betriebsergebnis) - Calculated as gross profit less lines 4-7
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Betriebsergebnis is correctly calculated (Gesamtleistung minus Materialaufwand, Personalaufwand, Abschreibungen, sonstige betriebliche Aufwendungen)

checklist.disclosure_item: Income from equity interests (Erträge aus Beteiligungen) - Line item 8
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Erträge aus Beteiligungen is disclosed as line item 8

checklist.disclosure_item: Income from other securities and loans (Erträge aus anderen Wertpapieren und Ausleihungen des Finanzanlagevermögens) - Line item 9
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Erträge aus anderen Wertpapieren und Ausleihungen is disclosed as line item 9

checklist.disclosure_item: Other interest and similar income (Sonstige Zinsen und ähnliche Erträge) - Line item 10
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Sonstige Zinsen und ähnliche Erträge is disclosed as line item 10

checklist.disclosure_item: Depreciation and amortization of financial assets and securities (Abschreibungen auf Finanzanlagen und auf Wertpapiere des Umlaufvermögens) - Line item 11
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Abschreibungen auf Finanzanlagen is disclosed as line item 11

checklist.disclosure_item: Interest and similar expenses (Zinsen und ähnliche Aufwendungen) - Line item 12
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Zinsen und ähnliche Aufwendungen is disclosed as line item 12

checklist.disclosure_item: Tax on income (Steuern vom Einkommen und vom Ertrag) - Line item 13
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Steuern vom Einkommen und vom Ertrag is disclosed as line item 13

checklist.disclosure_item: Other taxes (Sonstige Steuern) - Line item 14
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Sonstige Steuern is disclosed as line item 14

checklist.disclosure_item: Income from equity holdings (Erträge aus Beteiligungen) - Line item 8 alternative (capital cost method variant)
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Erträge aus Beteiligungen (including income from associated enterprises) is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Income from profit pooling, profit transfer or partial profit transfer agreements (Erträge aus Gewinnabführung) - Line item 15
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Erträge aus Gewinnabführung is disclosed as line item 15 (if applicable)

checklist.disclosure_item: Expenses from loss absorption (Verluste aus Gewinnabführung) - Line item 16
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Verluste aus Gewinnabführung is disclosed as line item 16 (if applicable)

checklist.disclosure_item: Annual profit (Jahresüberschuss) - Line item 17
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Jahresüberschuss is disclosed as line item 17

checklist.disclosure_item: Net loss (Jahresfehlbetrag) - Line item 18
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Jahresfehlbetrag is disclosed as line item 18 (if applicable)

checklist.disclosure_item: Profit/loss brought forward (Gewinnvortrag/Verlustvortrag) - Line item 19
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Gewinnvortrag or Verlustvortrag is disclosed as line item 19

checklist.disclosure_item: Appropriation to other revenue reserves (Entnahme aus der Kapitalrücklage, Entnahme aus Gewinnrücklagen) - Line item 20
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Entnahmen from capital reserves and profit reserves are disclosed as line item 20

checklist.disclosure_item: Appropriation to other revenue reserves (Einstellung in Gewinnrücklagen) - Line item 20 alternative
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Einstellungen in Gewinnrücklagen are disclosed as line item 20

checklist.disclosure_item: Undistributed profit (Bilanzgewinn) - Line item 21
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Bilanzgewinn (undistributed profit) is disclosed as line item 21

checklist.disclosure_item: Uncovered loss (Bilanzverlust) - Line item 21 alternative
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify Bilanzverlust (uncovered loss) is disclosed as line item 21 (if applicable)

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the entity have a chart of accounts (Kontenplan) that maps to the Gesamtkostenverfahren line items per §275 Abs. 2 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify the entity maintains a Kontenplan that aligns with the mandatory GuV structure

checklist.disclosure_item: Are comparative figures for the prior financial year disclosed in the GuV per §275 Abs. 3 HGB?
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify prior year figures (Vorjahreszahlen) are presented for all line items

checklist.disclosure_item: Are items in the GuV presented in accordance with the prior year's classification if any material changes in business activities require reclassification per §275 Abs. 4 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: If material changes in business activities require reclassification of prior year figures
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify any reclassifications are disclosed and explained in the notes

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the cost of raw materials and supplies (Aufwendungen für Roh-, Hilfs- und Betriebsstoffe) broken down per §285 Nr. 8 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of raw materials and supplies costs is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Are the cost of merchandise purchased (Aufwendungen für bezogene Waren) broken down per §285 Nr. 8 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of merchandise costs is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the cost of services purchased (Aufwendungen für bezogene Leistungen) broken down per §285 Nr. 8 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of purchased services costs is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Are personnel costs broken down by wage and salary costs ( Löhne und Gehälter) per §285 Nr. 9 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of Löhne und Gehälter is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Are personnel costs broken down by social security and other pension costs (Soziale Abgaben und Aufwendungen für Altersversorgung) per §285 Nr. 9 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of social security and pension costs is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Are the average number of employees during the financial year disclosed per §285 Nr. 9 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify average number of employees is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Is revenue broken down by business activity (Tätigkeit) per §285 Nr. 14 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: If disclosure is not prohibited by §286 Abs. 2 and would not cause significant harm to the company
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify revenue breakdown by business activity is disclosed or justification for non-disclosure is provided

checklist.disclosure_item: Is revenue broken down by geographic market ( Märkte) per §285 Nr. 14 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: If disclosure is not prohibited by §286 Abs. 2 and would not cause significant harm to the company
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify revenue breakdown by geographic market is disclosed or justification for non-disclosure is provided

checklist.disclosure_item: If revenue breakdown by activity or geography is not disclosed, has the entity invoked the protective clause under §286 Abs. 2 HGB?
checklist.trigger_condition: If disclosure per §285 Nr. 14 would seriously harm the company
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify protective clause is invoked with explicit reference to §286 Abs. 2

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the entity eligible for exemptions under §288 Abs. 2 HGB for medium-sized GmbH?
checklist.trigger_condition: If two of three thresholds exceeded: €12M revenue, €6M assets, 50 employees
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify size criteria for §288 Abs. 2 exemptions

checklist.disclosure_item: If eligible under §288 Abs. 2, are certain notes disclosures omitted (e.g., certain breakdowns)?
checklist.trigger_condition: If §288 Abs. 2 applies (medium-sized GmbH)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify which exemptions under §288 Abs. 2 are applied

checklist.disclosure_item: Is the entity required to provide a management report (Lagebericht) despite being medium-sized under §289 HGB?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify management report is prepared per §289 HGB

checklist.disclosure_item: Is there a clear presentation of the GuV using the vertically aligned format per §275 Abs. 1 HGB?
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify GuV is presented in vertical format with all mandatory line items

checklist.disclosure_item: Are material items in the GuV not netted but shown separately per §265 Abs. 7 HGB?
checklist.evidence_location: Profit and loss account (Gewinn- und Verlustrechnung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify no material netting of income and expenses without separate disclosure

checklist.disclosure_item: Have the accounting and valuation methods used been disclosed? (Bilanzierungsmethoden)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that all accounting policies applied in the financial statements are disclosed, including the method of measuring fixed assets, depreciation, and inventories

checklist.disclosure_item: Have any changes to accounting and valuation methods been disclosed with justification? (Änderung der Bilanzierungsmethoden)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosures on any changes to accounting policies and the reasons for such changes

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the impact of any material changes in estimates been disclosed? (Wesentliche Schätzungsänderungen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify any material changes in estimates are disclosed with their financial impact

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the name and registered office of subsidiaries been disclosed? (Name und Sitz von Tochterunternehmen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that for each subsidiary: name, registered office (location), and ownership interest are disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the equity ( Eigenkapital) of subsidiaries been disclosed? (Eigenkapital der Tochterunternehmen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the equity of each subsidiary is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Has an exemption from preparing consolidated accounts (Konzernabschluss) been disclosed with reasons and criteria? (Befreiung von Konzernabschluss)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that if exemption from group accounts is claimed, the reasons and criteria under §296 HGB are disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a breakdown of revenue by category and geographic market been disclosed? (Umsatzaufteilung nach Segmenten bzw. Märkten)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify revenue breakdown by business segment and geographic market; conditional on not claiming §288 Abs. 2 exemption

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a disclosure of stock movements / changes in inventories been made? (Vorratsbestandsveränderung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of the change in inventory levels (raw materials, work in progress, finished goods)

checklist.disclosure_item: Have other operating income (sonstige Erträge) been broken down by category? (Sonstige Erträge)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of other operating income by major category

checklist.disclosure_item: Has research and development (Forschung und Entwicklung) expenditure been disclosed? (Forschungs- und Entwicklungskosten)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of R&D costs, including any amounts capitalized / expensed

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a breakdown of material costs ( Materialaufwand) been disclosed? (Materialaufwand)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of material costs by category; conditional on not claiming §288 Abs. 2 exemption

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a breakdown of personnel costs ( Personalaufwand) been disclosed? (Personalaufwand)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of personnel costs (wages, salaries, social security, pensions); conditional on not claiming §288 Abs. 2 exemption

checklist.disclosure_item: Have depreciation and amortization methods and periods been disclosed? (Abschreibungsmethoden)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of depreciation and amortization methods (linear, declining balance, unit-of-production) and useful lives applied

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on related party transactions (Nahestehende Unternehmen und Personen) been disclosed? (Geschäfte mit nahestehenden Unternehmen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of material transactions with related parties (shareholders, management, affiliates), including terms and nature

checklist.disclosure_item: Have off-balance sheet commitments (außerbilanzielle Verpflichtungen) been disclosed? (Haftungsverhältnisse)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of contingent liabilities, guarantees, liens on assets, and other off-balance sheet commitments

checklist.disclosure_item: Have any restatements of prior year figures (Rückwirkung von Bilanzänderungen) been disclosed? (Rückwirkende Änderungen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify any material restatements of prior year amounts are disclosed with explanations

checklist.disclosure_item: Have subsequent events (nachträgliche Ereignisse) after the balance sheet date been disclosed? (Nachtragsbericht)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of material events occurring between balance sheet date and authorization date

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the average number of employees (Durchschnittszahl der Beschäftigten) been disclosed? (Beschäftigtenzahl)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of average number of employees during the financial year, broken down by category

checklist.disclosure_item: Have audit fees (Honorar des Abschlussprüfers) for the auditor been disclosed? (Abschlussprüferhonorar)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of total audit fees paid to the external auditor

checklist.disclosure_item: Has management remuneration (Vorstands-/Geschäftsführungsvergütung) been disclosed individually or in aggregate? (Gesamtbezüge der Organmitglieder)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of total remuneration paid to management (board/executive directors), individually or aggregated

checklist.disclosure_item: Have transactions with controlling entities or their related parties been disclosed? (Geschäfte mit beherrschendem Unternehmen)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of transactions with controlling company; conditional on not claiming §288 Abs. 2 exemption

checklist.disclosure_item: Has any share-based payment (aktienbasierte Vergütung) been disclosed? (Aktienbasierte Vergütung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of share-based payment arrangements, including number of instruments and vesting conditions

checklist.disclosure_item: Has any significant uncalled capital (ausstehende Einlagen) been disclosed? (Nicht eingeforderte Einlagen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of called-but-unpaid capital contributions

checklist.disclosure_item: Has parent company information (Mutterunternehmen) been disclosed? (Mutterunternehmen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of the immediate parent company (name, registered office, legal form)

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a simplified IFRS transition disclosure been made? (Vereinfachter IFRS-Übergangsbericht)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify IFRS transition disclosures if applicable; conditional on not claiming §288 Abs. 2 exemption

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on consolidated entities (Konsolidierungskreis) been disclosed? (Tochterunternehmen im Konzernabschluss)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify the list of entities included in the group accounts, including method and date of inclusion

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on branch offices (Zweigniederlassungen) been disclosed? (Zweigniederlassungen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of branch offices (registered and unregistered) locations

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on pension commitments ( Pensionsverpflichtungen) been disclosed? (Pensionsverpflichtungen)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of pension obligations, including funding status and actuarial assumptions

checklist.disclosure_item: Have audit fees been broken down by activity (Abschlussprüferleistungen)? (Aufschlüsselung des Prüfungshonorars)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify breakdown of auditor fees: audit, other assurance services, tax advisory, other services

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a statement on the application of the simplification rule for deferred taxes (§274a HGB) been disclosed? ( Vereinfachungsregelung latente Steuern)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure on application of the simplified method for recognizing deferred taxes

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a statement on the use of the exemption under §264 Abs. 3 HGB (small company relief) been made? (Handelsrechtliche Befreiung)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify any invocation of small company exemptions under §264(3) HGB is disclosed

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the disclosure of financial instruments at fair value (Bewertungseinheiten) been made? (Bewertungseinheiten)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of hedge accounting arrangements and the effectiveness of hedging relationships

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on the disaggregation of revenue (Umsatzzerlegung) been disclosed? (Umsatzzerlegung)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify detailed breakdown of revenue by type of business activity

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on the fair value of financial instruments (Beizulegender Zeitwert) been disclosed? (Fair-Value-Angaben)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of fair value measurement methods and key assumptions for financial instruments

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a statement on the recognition and measurement of lease assets and liabilities been disclosed? (Leasingangaben)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of right-of-use assets and lease liabilities, including critical assumptions

checklist.disclosure_item: Has information on the nature and extent of government grants (Investitionszulagen) been disclosed? (Zuwendungen der öffentlichen Hand)
checklist.trigger_condition: Exempt for medium GmbH per §288 Abs. 2 HGB - not required to disclose
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of government grants received and their accounting treatment

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a statement on the underlying currency for significant transactions been disclosed? (Währungsangaben)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of currencies used and exchange rate assumptions for foreign currency items

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the protective clause (Schutzklausel) under §286 HGB been invoked appropriately? (Befreiung von Einzelangaben)
checklist.trigger_condition: Entity claims §286 exemption for specific disclosures
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that any §286 protective clause invocations are properly justified and documented

checklist.disclosure_item: Have other mandatory disclosures under §287 HGB been provided? (Sonstige Pflichtangaben)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify compliance with all other mandatory §287 requirements

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a statement on the assumption of going concern (Fortführung der Unternehmenstätigkeit) been disclosed? (Going-Concern-Annahme)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify statement on the validity of the going concern assumption, or disclosure if there are material uncertainties

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the balance sheet date (Bilanzstichtag) been disclosed? (Jahresabschlussstichtag)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of the balance sheet date (31 December 2023)

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the legal form (Rechtsform) of the entity been disclosed? (Rechtsform)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of legal form (GmbH)

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the company's registered office (Sitz der Gesellschaft) been disclosed? (Sitz der Gesellschaft)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of the registered office (city, country)

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the company's object (Unternehmensgegenstand) been disclosed? (Gegenstand des Unternehmens)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of the company's object/purpose as per articles of association

checklist.disclosure_item: Has a list of managing directors (Geschäftsführer) with names been disclosed? (Name(n) der Geschäftsführer)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of names of managing directors as of balance sheet date

checklist.disclosure_item: Has membership of the Gesellschafterversammlung been disclosed? (Gesellschafter)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of shareholders with >25% ownership or sufficient for transparency

checklist.disclosure_item: Have the members of the supervisory board (Aufsichtsrat) been disclosed? (Mitglieder des Aufsichtsrats)
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify disclosure of supervisory board members as of balance sheet date

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity claimed the §288 Abs. 2 exemption from certain §285 disclosures? (Kleinunternehmerprivileg)
checklist.trigger_condition: Entity claims §288 Abs. 2 exemption
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that any §288 Abs. 2 exemption claim is properly documented with meeting size criteria

checklist.disclosure_item: If §288 Abs. 2 exemption is claimed, has the entity met the size criteria? (Größenkriterien)
checklist.trigger_condition: Entity claims §288 Abs. 2 exemption
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the entity meets §267(2) medium company criteria for invoking §288(2) exemption

checklist.disclosure_item: Has the entity disclosed the exercise of the 5-year exemption option for medium companies? (Fünf-Jahres-Befreiung)
checklist.trigger_condition: Entity invokes 5-year exemption under §288 Abs. 1
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify proper disclosure if entity elects 5-year relief from certain medium-company requirements

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht present the business progress (Geschäftsverlauf) including the business result (Geschäftsergebnis) in a manner that gives a true and fair view of the company's position?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Geschäftsverlauf (business progress) and Geschäftsergebnis (business result) are described comprehensively and present a true and fair view of the company's position.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht present the Lage (position) of the capital company so that a true and fair view (den tatsächlichen Verhältnissen entsprechendes Bild) is conveyed?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Lage (position) of the company is described in a manner that conveys a true and fair view reflecting the actual circumstances.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht contain a balanced and comprehensive analysis (ausgewogene und umfassende Analyse) appropriate to the scope and complexity of the business activities?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify the analysis is balanced (covers both positive and negative aspects), comprehensive (covers all material areas), and appropriate to the scale and complexity of business operations.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht include the most significant financial performance indicators (finanzielle Leistungsindikatoren) that are material to the business activities?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that key financial performance indicators (e.g., revenue, profitability, liquidity ratios) material to the business are identified and disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are the financial performance indicators explained with reference to the amounts shown in the annual financial statements?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that each financial performance indicator is cross-referenced to the corresponding amounts in the annual financial statements (Jahresabschluss).

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht assess and explain the expected future development (voraussichtliche Entwicklung) including its material opportunities (Chancen) and risks (Risiken)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the expected development is assessed and explained, including material opportunities (Chancen) and risks (Risiken) affecting the company's future outlook.

checklist.disclosure_item: Are the underlying assumptions (Annahmen) for the expected development disclosed in the Lagebericht?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the key assumptions underlying the expected development projections are explicitly stated.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose the risk management objectives and methods (Risikomanagementziele und -methoden) of the company?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the company's risk management objectives and methods are described, including the governance structure and processes for identifying and managing risks.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose the methods used to hedge all important types of transactions that are recognised in hedge accounting?
checklist.trigger_condition: If the company uses hedge accounting (Bilanzierung von Sicherungsgeschäften)
checklist.completeness_prompt: If hedge accounting is applied, verify that the methods for hedging important transaction types are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose price change risks (Preisänderungsrisiken) to which the company is exposed, in relation to the use of financial instruments?
checklist.trigger_condition: If price change risks are material for assessing the company's position or expected development
checklist.completeness_prompt: If material for assessing position or outlook, verify that price change risks (e.g., market risk, commodity price risk) related to financial instruments are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose default risks (Ausfallrisiken) to which the company is exposed, in relation to the use of financial instruments?
checklist.trigger_condition: If default risks are material for assessing the company's position or expected development
checklist.completeness_prompt: If material for assessing position or outlook, verify that default/credit risks related to financial instruments are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose liquidity risks (Liquiditätsrisiken) to which the company is exposed, in relation to the use of financial instruments?
checklist.trigger_condition: If liquidity risks are material for assessing the company's position or expected development
checklist.completeness_prompt: If material for assessing position or outlook, verify that liquidity risks related to financial instruments are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose risks from payment flow fluctuations (Zahlungsstromschwankungen) to which the company is exposed, in relation to the use of financial instruments?
checklist.trigger_condition: If cash flow fluctuation risks are material for assessing the company's position or expected development
checklist.completeness_prompt: If material for assessing position or outlook, verify that risks from payment/cash flow fluctuations related to financial instruments are disclosed.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht include disclosure on the research and development area (Bereich Forschung und Entwicklung)?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the Lagebericht addresses the company's research and development activities, including ongoing projects, innovation efforts, and R&D strategy.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht disclose existing branch offices (bestehende Zweigniederlassungen) of the company?
checklist.completeness_prompt: Verify that the existence and nature of any branch offices (Zweigniederlassungen) are disclosed in the Lagebericht.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht describe the essential features of the internal control system (wesentliche Merkmale des internen Kontrollsystems) in relation to the accounting process?
checklist.trigger_condition: If the company is a capital market oriented company (§ 264d HGB - Kapitalmarktorientierte Kapitalgesellschaft)
checklist.completeness_prompt: If the company falls under § 264d (capital market oriented), verify that the essential features of the internal control system in relation to the accounting (Rechnungslegungsprozess) are described.

checklist.disclosure_item: Does the Lagebericht describe the essential features of the risk management system (wesentliche Merkmale des Risikomanagementsystems) in relation to the accounting process?
checklist.trigger_condition: If the company is a capital market oriented company (§ 264d HGB - Kapitalmarktorientierte Kapitalgesellschaft)
checklist.completeness_prompt: If the company falls under § 264d (capital market oriented), verify that the essential features of the risk management system in relation to the accounting (Rechnungslegungsprozess) are described.
